facebook.content: This or That: In the Bible, some of the greatest victories happen when God's people are forced to trust Him in the midst of chaos, while others occur when they take deliberate steps to prioritize quiet time with Him. Which resonates more with your own experience: Trusting God through the storm, or cultivating a deeper relationship with Him in the stillness?
facebook.fullPost:
This or That: In the Bible, some of the greatest victories happen when God's people are forced to trust Him in the midst of chaos, while others occur when they take deliberate steps to prioritize quiet time with Him. Which resonates more with your own experience: Trusting God through the storm, or cultivating a deeper relationship with Him in the stillness?

instagram.content:
Kingdom Conversation

The moment we truly trust God is not when everything's going well, but when our circumstances make no sense. Can you relate to that?

Finish this sentence: The moment I stopped trusting in circumstances and started trusting in God's sovereignty was when _______________________

tiktok.content: "Faith is not just a feeling, but a decision. It's not about what you feel in your heart, but about what you choose to do with what you know. When faith is put to the test, will you choose to obey God's voice, or your own doubts?"
